name: list_roles
description: List all roles defined in your Auth0 tenant with pagination. Returns role names, descriptions, and IDs that can be used to assign roles to users or inspect permissions.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page (max 100). Default is 50.

parameters.name: include_totals
parameters.description: Whether to include the total count in the response.

parameters.name: name_filter
parameters.description: Filter roles by name (case-insensitive partial match).
